analysis:
Based on your framework analysis:

**Best CSP:** NFLX 90 strike, 2026-05-22 expiry, 31 DTE, $1.52/$1.56 bid/ask, 0.28 delta, 20.1% annualized return
- Quality stock in pullback, 90.4% IVP, below 200MA but fundamentally sound

**Best CC:** GOOGL 350 strike, 2026-05-15 expiry, 24 DTE, $7.85/$8.00 bid/ask, 0.37 delta, 35.8% annualized return  
- Profit position, high IVP at 90.9%, good premium capture

**Best LEAPS/PMCC:** None qualifying

**Best Bull Call Spread:** None qualifying

**IVP Environment:** Elevated volatility across major names (NFLX 90.4%, GOOGL 90.9%, AMZN 77%) favoring premium collection strategies.
